# 2-colouring of Z_4^4 (points in lexicographic order, digits 0..3) with no
# monochromatic unit line (960 lines) => HJunit(4,2) >= 5 (Prop 6.7).
# REGENERATED witness (SAT, repository rebuild); any valid witness proves the bound.
